translations.de: Dieses Spiel bringt uns einander viel näher.
translations.ko: 이 게임은 우리를 서로 많이 가깝게 해줘요.
translations.zh-Hans: 这个游戏让我们更加亲近。
translations.yue: 呢個遊戲令我哋親密咗好多。
translations.tr: Bu oyun bizi birbirimize çok yaklaştırıyor.
translations.vi: Trò chơi này làm chúng ta gần gũi nhau hơn nhiều.
translations.nl: Dit spel brengt ons veel dichter bij elkaar.
translations.hu: Ez a játék nagyon összehoz minket.
translations.hi: यह खेल हमें एक-दूसरे के बहुत करीब लाता है.
translations.el: Αυτό το παιχνίδι μας φέρνει πολύ πιο κοντά.
translations.nb: Dette spillet bringer oss mye nærmere hverandre.
translations.sv: Det här spelet för oss mycket närmare varandra.
translations.ro: Jocul acesta ne apropie foarte mult.
translations.da: Dette spil bringer os meget tættere på hinanden.
translations.fi: Tämä peli tuo meitä paljon lähemmäs toisiamme.
translations.ja: このゲームは私たちをとても近づけてくれる。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner marking a specific masculine singular noun.
Common noun; head of the noun phrase serving as subject.
Clitic object pronoun (1st person plural) functioning as the direct object of the verb.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with the subject “Ce jeu.”
Degree adverb modifying the verb; intensifies the action.

translations.de: Schieb den Stuhl ein bisschen näher.
translations.vi: Kéo cái ghế lại gần một chút.
translations.nl: Schuif de stoel een beetje dichterbij.
translations.hu: Húzd egy kicsit közelebb a széket.
translations.hi: कुर्सी को थोड़ा पास कर दो.
translations.el: Φέρε λίγο πιο κοντά την καρέκλα.

tokens.explanation: Imperative, 2nd person singular; main verb giving a command.
Indefinite determiner in the fixed quantifying expression “un peu.”
Nominal quantifier in the expression “un peu,” functioning adverbially to soften the command.
Definite article introducing a feminine singular noun.
Common noun; direct object of the verb.

sentences.target: Je vais rapprocher les tasses pour toi.
sentences.reading: /ʒə vɛ ʁapʁɔʃe le tas puʁ twa/

translations.fr: Je vais rapprocher les tasses pour toi.
translations.ipa: /ʒə vɛ ʁapʁɔʃe le tas puʁ twa/
translations.en: I'm going to bring the cups closer for you.
translations.es: Voy a acercar las tazas para ti.
translations.de: Ich rücke die Tassen für dich näher zusammen.
translations.ko: 너를 위해 컵들을 더 가까이 놓을게.
translations.zh-Hans: 我给你把杯子挪近一点。
translations.ru: Я пододвину чашки поближе для тебя.
translations.pt: Vou aproximar as xícaras para você.
translations.vi: Tôi sẽ kéo mấy cái cốc lại gần cho bạn.
translations.nl: Ik ga de kopjes voor je dichter bij elkaar zetten.
translations.uk: Я підісуну чашки ближче для тебе.
translations.hi: मैं तुम्हारे लिए कपों को थोड़ा पास कर दूँगा.
translations.el: Θα φέρω τις κούπες πιο κοντά για σένα.
translations.nb: Jeg skal flytte koppene nærmere for deg.
translations.sv: Jag ska flytta kopparna närmare åt dig.
translations.ro: O să apropii ceștile pentru tine.
translations.da: Jeg flytter kopperne lidt tættere på for dig.
translations.ja: あなたのためにカップを近くに寄せるね。

tokens.explanation: Subject clitic pronoun, 1st person singular.
Auxiliary “aller” in present indicative (1st person singular) forming the near future.
Infinitive main verb complement of the auxiliary “aller.”
Definite article, plural, introducing the direct object noun.
Common noun, plural; direct object of the verb.
Preposition introducing a beneficiary phrase.
Stressed pronoun (2nd person singular) as object of the preposition.

sentences.target: On rapproche les chaises pour la photo.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ ʁapʁɔʃ le ʃɛz puʁ la fɔto/

translations.fr: On rapproche les chaises pour la photo.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ ʁapʁɔʃ le ʃɛz puʁ la fɔto/
translations.en: We're moving the chairs closer for the photo.
translations.es: Acercamos las sillas para la foto.
translations.de: Wir rücken die Stühle für das Foto näher zusammen.
translations.it: Avviciniamo le sedie per la foto.
translations.ko: 사진을 위해 의자들을 더 가까이 옮기고 있어.
translations.zh-Hans: 为了拍照，我们把椅子挪近一些。
translations.yue: 為咗影相，我哋將啲凳拉埋啲。
translations.ru: Мы придвигаем стулья поближе для фото.
translations.pt: Estamos aproximando as cadeiras para a foto.
translations.he: אנחנו מקרבים את הכיסאות בשביל התמונה.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang kéo ghế lại gần để chụp ảnh.
translations.ar: نحن نُقرّب الكراسي من أجل الصورة.
translations.nl: We schuiven de stoelen dichter bij elkaar voor de foto.
translations.uk: Ми посуваємо стільці ближче для фото.
translations.hu: A fotóhoz közelebb toljuk a székeket.
translations.hi: हम फोटो के लिए कुर्सियाँ पास कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Φέρνουμε τις καρέκλες πιο κοντά για τη φωτογραφία.
translations.nb: Vi flytter stolene nærmere for bildet.
translations.id: Kami sedang mendekatkan kursi untuk foto.
translations.sv: Vi flyttar stolarna närmare för fotot.
translations.ro: Mutăm scaunele mai aproape pentru poză.
translations.da: Vi rykker stolene tættere sammen til billedet.
translations.ja: 写真を撮るために椅子を近づけています。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (impersonal/colloquial ‘we’), 3rd person singular agreement.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular, agreeing with “On.”
Definite article, plural, introducing the direct object noun.
Common noun, plural; direct object of the verb.
Preposition introducing a purpose phrase.
Definite article, feminine singular.
Common noun; head of the prepositional object (“pour la photo”).
